title: Malaysian Crusty Magical Toast
description: A unique breakfast recipe combining magical Malaysian flavors with crusty bread.

ingredients.name: Crusty Bread
ingredients.notes: Freshly baked in a stone oven

ingredients.name: Malaysian Coconut Milk
ingredients.notes: Canned or fresh, whichever suits your needs

instructions: Toast the bread for 2-3 minutes, or until crispy.
In a small bowl, mix together the Magical Spice Blend and coconut milk.
Brush the toasted bread with the spice mixture, making sure to coat it evenly.
Place the coated bread in the oven and bake for 2-3 minutes, or until fragrant and crispy.
Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool for a minute.
Drizzle with honey, if desired, and garnish with cilantro.
Serve immediately and enjoy the magical flavors of Malaysia!
